mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Čiovo to Knin?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 125 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, luggage included. A return trip is 250.
At your exact address in Čiovo, whether a home, hotel or apartment. Send the address when you book and I will confirm the meeting point.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup time. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
